text.title: IndieHackers Build-in-Public Strategy Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Genuine product + 12-week commitment + can publish revenue?

branch.when: real_product == true AND weeks_committed >= 12 AND can_publish_revenue == true
